brief: A modernist furniture brand selling a small, carefully designed collection of seating, tables, and lighting. The audience is design-literate buyers and interior designers. Pages should cover the brand and philosophy, the collection, individual product detail, materials and craftsmanship, and stockists/contact. Lean into a minimal, monochrome aesthetic: generous whitespace, a precise neutral sans-serif, large product imagery, and almost no decorative ornament.
summary: Built PLINTH, a six-page modernist furniture studio site with a strict monochrome design system (Archivo/Inter, warm-neutral palette, generous whitespace), shared header/footer, custom inline-SVG line illustrations for every piece, and distinct page types: home, collection index, product detail, craft/materials, studio/about, and stockists/contact.
